## Acceptance Criteria

Pass. `gate define --auto` is parsed in [cli.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/src/cli.rs:998) and normalized to `GateMode::Auto` in [main.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/src/main.rs:2218). `doc add --title` is accepted via the visible alias on `label` in [cli.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/src/cli.rs:1288). Transposed `gate check` args produce an actionable suggestion in [main.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/src/main.rs:2413). Top-level `list` and `rdeps` are normalized to canonical commands in [main.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/src/main.rs:1013).

## Architecture and Separation

No boundary violation found. The change stays in CLI definitions and command dispatch; persistence remains behind existing executor/storage APIs.

## Functional Paradigm

No blocking issue found. The implementation is small dispatch/argument normalization code where imperative control flow is appropriate.

## Correctness and Invariants

No blocking issue found. The prior `rdeps` default-depth divergence is fixed: top-level `rdeps` now defaults to depth `1` in [cli.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/src/cli.rs:160), matching canonical `graph rdeps`.

## Safety

No unsafe code found in the reviewed change surface. Workspace has `#![deny(unsafe_code)]` in [main.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/src/main.rs:14).

## Testing

Used the provided passed `cargo-ci` gate as primary test evidence and did not rerun cargo tests. I ran `./scripts/jit-validate.sh`; it passed.

REQ-05 coverage exists in [first_guess_residuals_test.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/tests/first_guess_residuals_test.rs:52), including the prior review regression for multi-level `rdeps` default depth at [first_guess_residuals_test.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/tests/first_guess_residuals_test.rs:213).

## Error Handling

No blocking issue found. The transposed gate-check path emits structured JSON error output with `INVALID_ARGUMENT`, details, and suggestion.

## CLI Contract

Pass. The reviewed first-guess command surfaces include `--json`, and aliases normalize into canonical handlers that already emit machine-readable output.

## Documentation

No blocking documentation issue found for this CLI change. Help text documents `--auto`, `--title`, top-level `list`, and top-level `rdeps`.

## Prior Review Feedback

Resolved. The most recent failed review found that `jit rdeps <id>` defaulted to unbounded depth while `jit graph rdeps <id>` defaulted to immediate dependents. Current code sets the top-level default to `1` and adds a multi-level regression test.
